name: Superheavy Samurai Stealthy
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>オン－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>３</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ミ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>２</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ツー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you have no Spells/Traps in your GY, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Superheavy Samurai Stealthy" once per turn this way. If you have no Spells/Traps in your GY (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card, then target 1 Spell/Trap in your opponent's GY; Set it to your field, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Superheavy Samurai Stealthy" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you have no Spells/Traps in your GY, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Superheavy Samurai Stealthy" once per turn this way. If you have no Spells/Traps in your GY (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card, then target 1 Spell/Trap in your opponent's GY; Set it to your field, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Superheavy Samurai Stealthy" once per turn.
eff: If you have no Spells/Traps in your GY, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Superheavy Samurai Stealthy" once per turn this way. If you have no Spells/Traps in your GY (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card, then target 1 Spell/Trap in your opponent's GY; Set it to your field, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "Superheavy Samurai Stealthy" once per turn.

action: Sets from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
banished: Banishes cards when they leave the field
misc: Requires having no Spells in Graveyard
Requires having no Traps in Graveyard
